description: Create a Bridge Command scenario titled 'Solent Wind Farm Assessment' at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/w) Solent Wind Farm Assessment/'. The scenario should use the 'Solent' world, starting at 08:00 with 2.0 nm visibility and Sea State 3. Position the ownship 2.0 nm South of the farm center, heading North (360). The farm consists of a 3x3 grid of 9 static turbines (using the 'Buoy' model) centered at 50.700 N, 1.000 W, with turbines spaced exactly 0.5 nautical miles apart in both latitude and longitude (1 degree Latitude = 60 nm; 1 degree Longitude = 60 * cos(Latitude) nm). Include a 'Guard Vessel' (using the 'Pilot' model) patrolling the perimeter of the grid at 10 kts with waypoints outside the array. Document the calculated coordinates of the four corner turbines in a text file at '/home/ga/Documents/notice_to_mariners_014.txt'.
